toggleButton.label: Task Pane
toggleButton.supertip: Show or hide the Sarwar PCMS task pane for data entry and review.

button.label: Refresh Sheet Data
button.supertip: Recalculate PCMS custom fields on the active sheet.

button.label: Validate Schedule
button.supertip: Run DCMA-style schedule/EVM checks on the active sheet (dates, float, logic, variances, % complete).

button.label: Export Findings
button.supertip: Write all validation findings to a new PCMS_Validation sheet.

button.label: Save Snapshot
button.supertip: Save the active sheet's schedule/EVM data and validation findings to the local Sarwar PCMS database.

button.label: Load Last Snapshot
button.supertip: Load the most recently saved snapshot into a new sheet for comparison.

button.label: Build EVM Dashboard
button.supertip: Generate an S-curve chart (cumulative PV/EV/AC) and headline SPI/CPI on a new sheet.

button.label: Highlight Critical Path
button.supertip: Color rows red (critical, float≤0) or yellow (near-critical, float≤5 days) based on Total Float.
